
Catch Fits {data-navmenu="Data Fits"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Catch Fits by Fleet

```{r catch_facet}
mv_plot_obs_pred_facet(
  df    = mv$catch_fits,
  facet = "fleet",
  ylab  = "Catch"
)
```

### Discard Fits

```{r disc_facet, eval=has_disc && !is.null(mv$discard_fits)}
mv_plot_obs_pred_facet(
  df    = mv$discard_fits,
  facet = "fleet",
  ylab  = "Discards"
)
```
